app.subtitle: AI Email Copilot
account.signOutBusy: Sign out is already in progress.
jobs.activityDescription: Recent async sync and digest jobs.
jobs.noJobsHint: Async sync and digest jobs will appear here.
dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Today digest, action queue, and mailbox health.
digest.notSignedInMessage: Sign in with your MailMind account to load the digest.
digest.noDigestMessage: Generate today's digest after syncing email.
digest.backendUnavailableMessage: Unable to reach the server. Check that the backend is running.
digest.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
digest.loadedFromBackend: Today's digest is loaded from the backend when available.
digest.jobCompletedMessage: Digest job completed. Today's digest refreshed.
digest.noItemsMessage: The backend returned a digest without item-level recommendations.
digest.pageDescription: Today's email summary and recommended review items.
emails.title: Emails
emails.description: Messages received today from connected mailboxes.
emails.notSignedInMessage: Sign in with your MailMind account to load emails.
emails.noTodayHint: No messages were returned for today.
emails.noMailboxHint: Add a mailbox before viewing emails.
emails.noMatchingSearchHint: No messages match the current search and read filter.
emails.noMatchingFilterHint: The current read filter has no matching messages.
emails.allSourceHint: All mailboxes is optional. Each email shows its source mailbox.
emails.detailDescription: Message content and read state from the connected mailbox.
emails.missingId: The route did not include an email id.
emails.detailNotSignedIn: Sign in with your MailMind account to load this email.
emails.unsupportedProviderAction: This mailbox provider does not support this action yet.
actions.title: Actions
actions.description: Audit trail for user-triggered mailbox and digest actions.
actions.pageDescription: Recent MailMind actions and provider effects.
actions.notSignedInMessage: Sign in with your MailMind account to view action history.
actions.noActionsHint: User actions will appear here after email or digest operations.
actions.noMatchingHint: Adjust the filters to view more action history.
actions.selectHint: Choose an action from the list to view status and provider effect.
mailboxes.title: Gmail
mailboxes.description: Manage the Gmail account authorized for MailMind.
mailboxes.pageDescription: Connect and manage mailbox instances. Each provider account syncs independently.
mailboxes.connectedDescription: Mailbox instances returned by the backend. Each card maps to one mailbox id.
mailboxes.addDescription: Choose a provider type, then add another mailbox instance.
mailboxes.addGmailHint: Connect a Gmail account with OAuth. You can repeat this for another Gmail account.
mailboxes.addImapHint: Connect QQ Mail, 163 Mail, Gmail IMAP, or a custom IMAP mailbox.
mailboxes.outlookComingSoon: Outlook is prepared as a provider skeleton and is not connectable yet.
mailboxes.editUnavailable: Editing IMAP settings will be wired after the mailbox update endpoint lands.
mailboxes.updatePasswordUnavailable: Password updates will be wired after the credential update endpoint lands.
mailboxes.signInHint: Sign in with your MailMind account before connecting Gmail.
mailboxes.stateBackendUnavailable: Mailbox state cannot be loaded until the backend is reachable.
mailboxes.noGmailReturned: No Gmail mailbox was returned by the backend.
mailboxes.disconnectConfirm: Disconnect Gmail from MailMind? Email data already synced remains in MailMind, but new Gmail syncs will stop.
mailboxes.imapDescription: Connect a password-based IMAP mailbox for independent manual sync.
mailboxes.imapConnected: IMAP mailbox connected. Mailbox list refreshed.
mailboxes.listDescription: Connected mailbox state and sync activity.
mailboxes.listMultiDescription: Connected mailbox state and sync activity. Each mailbox syncs independently.
mailboxes.syncJobCompleted: Sync job completed. Mailbox status refreshed.
login.title: Sign in
register.title: Create account
profile.title: Profile
profile.accountDescription: Current system login state from the auth session.
profile.preferencesDescription: Timezone affects how Daily Digest windows are calculated.
profile.disabledReason: Profile editing is not available until the profile update API is enabled.
security.title: Security
security.description: System login security. Session, cookie, and encryption status are described here.
security.sessionDescription: MVP uses HttpOnly cookie sessions. Status is descriptive only.
security.noSecrets: No real keys, tokens, or secrets are displayed or generated here.
security.changePasswordDescription: Password change requires the current password.
security.disabledReason: Password change is not available until the password update API is enabled.
